data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md` following the pattern of `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/blue-team-review.md` but filtering epic-level scenarios (not cross-story adversarial findings).

Content requirements:
- Placeholders: `{epic-title}`, `{epic-description}`, `{red-team-scenarios}`
- Filtering criteria:
  1. Possible: scenario is achievable given the codebase and proposed design
  2. Actionable: concrete remediation or design adjustment exists
  3. Distinct: not already covered by Step 2.5 gap analysis
  4. High confidence: evidence-based, not speculative
- Output format: JSON with `surviving_scenarios` array (preserving red team fields + `disposition`, `filter_rationale`) and `filtered_scenarios` array
- Analysis-only instructions (no file modifications, no commands)
- test-exempt: static asset only (markdown prompt file consumed by LLM agents, no conditional logic, no executable code)

**TDD Requirement**: RED test from dcfe-8be7 fails on blue-team prompt-exists and placeholder assertions. After creating this prompt, `test_blue_team_prompt_structure` assertions turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md
- [ ] Prompt has required placeholders
  Verify: grep -q '{epic-title}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md && grep -q '{epic-description}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md && grep -q '{red-team-scenarios}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md
- [ ] Prompt has filtering criteria section
  Verify: grep -qi 'filtering criteria\|filter.*criteria' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md
- [ ] Blue team adds disposition and filter_rationale fields
  Verify: grep -q 'disposition' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md && grep -q 'filter_rationale' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md
